title: Composition Create Api Server
description: SpecD Studio and `specd serve` need one factory that turns a discovered project into a listening HTTP server without reimplementing CLI workflow rules. `createApiServer` loads `api.auth` from `specd.yaml`, resolves the auth adapter once at startup, constructs a single process-scoped `Kernel`, registers all Studio routes under `/v1`, and can optionally mount the built `@specd/ui` bundle for embedded `specd ui serve`.
context: SpecD Studio and `specd serve` need one factory that turns a discovered project into a listening HTTP server without reimplementing CLI workflow rules. `createApiServer` loads `api.auth` from `specd.yaml`, resolves the auth adapter once at startup, constructs a single process-scoped `Kernel`, registers all Studio routes under `/v1`, and can optionally mount the built `@specd/ui` bundle for embedded `specd ui serve`.

rules.requirement: createApiServer accepts project host port and auth configuration
rules: The factory MUST accept `{ projectRoot, host, port, auth, authRegistry?, uiDistPath? }` and return a listenable HTTP server.

rules.requirement: auth configuration is read from specd.yaml api.auth only
rules: Effective auth MUST come from `specd.yaml` `api.auth` merged with CLI overrides. v1 MUST reject any `--auth` value other than `disabled`.

rules.requirement: one kernel per process with per-request context
rules:
The factory MUST call `createKernel` once per process with a `LogRingBuffer` (callback destination) and build per-request context via `createApiContext`.

The kernel MUST receive `logFormatter: createLogFormatter({ colorize: false })` so Studio log readback (`GET /v1/logs?prettier=true`) returns plain text without ANSI escape sequences.
Route plugins for project, changes, workspaces, specs, graph, and logs MUST register under the `/v1` prefix.

rules.requirement: health or project payload exposes auth type without secrets
rules: `GET /v1/health` and/or `GET /v1/project` MUST echo `auth: { type }` matching effective configuration without returning tokens or key material.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Factory returns listening server
